content.en:
When it came to Time Hengjin, the expression of the Frostless Lord was completely different.

"Time Constant Gold is an incomparably precious treasure, it can help the legendary lord to comprehend the mysteries of time.

The Frostless Lord introduced.

"The Bridge of Time, what's the use?"

Ye Tian asked.

The Frostless Lord longed: "The Bridge of Time is to construct a bridge to connect the River of Time, you have been to the River of Time in the Gray Mist Stone Statue before, you should know the effect of the River of Time on us in the half-step legendary realm, right? Of course, the bridge of time cannot exist forever, and it takes time to build a time bridge, and it takes time to maintain a time bridge. If there is enough time to keep gold, we can stay in the river of time forever in the half-step Eternal Realm. "

08 "That's what happened!"

Ye Tian understood the usefulness of Time Hengjin.

For the half-step Legendary Realm lords, many treasures are useless, and they don't care, maybe there are many extremely precious treasures in Ye Tian's eyes, and the half-step Legendary Realm lords can't look down on them, and even the treasure map in his hand, the half-step Legendary Realm lords won't look up at it.

However, the time constant gold is enough to make the half-step Legendary Realm Lord care.

Of course, if it is a piece of Time Constant Gold, it will not mean anything to the half-step Legendary Realm Lord, but if it is found in the lair of the Purple Aurora Beast, then it is possible to find a Time Constant Gold Vein.

Even if there is only one possibility, they will not let it go.

"Endless Lord, take us there!"

The Frostless Lord said urgently.

"Good!"

Ye Tian nodded.

This time, not only the Frostless Lord will go, but some other half-step legendary realms in the True Void Holy Land will also go.

In a short period of time, a total of eight half-step Legendary Realm Lords came.

"Let's go!"

These eight half-step Legendary Realm Lords followed Ye Tian first through the space-time ladder to the Source Sea, and then set off from the Source Sea and entered the Purple Light Domain, which was the fastest speed.

After all, they were not Legendary Realm Lords, so they naturally couldn't travel that fast.

If you are a Legendary Realm Lord and completely control the space, you can enter the Source Sea or the Purple Aurora Domain from the Infinite Sea with a single thought, and if you completely control time, you can travel from the long river of time, and the speed is not slow.

However, the half-step Legendary Realm Lord couldn't do this, so he could only honestly abandon shuttling and hurrying.

Time passed slowly, and after a long time, Ye Tian finally came to the lair of the Purple Aurora Beast with eight half-step Legendary Realm Lords.

Here, the sky sensed a lot of purple aurora beasts, and the half-step legendary realm lords also sensed it.

Rumble!!!

The Purple Aurora Beast that was chasing Ye Tian appeared and attacked them directly.

A terrifying purple light blasted in, but it was resisted by the frostless lord's hand.

"Come here!"

The Frostless Lord beckoned, and the Purple Aurora Beast, which could be called the Transcendent Realm Lord's invincibility, flew over, and continued to shrink, turning into a mini-beast and entering the hands of the Frostless Lord

"It's so strong!"

This was the first time Ye Tian had seen the Frostless Lord make a move, and he was really shocked.

It's a complete hanging!

Is there such a big difference in strength between the Transcendental Realm Legendary Lord and the half-step Legendary Realm Lord?

Lord Wumeng saw Ye Tian's shock, and couldn't help but say: "Endless Lord, the Frostless Lord is enough to rank in the top three among the many half-step Legendary Realms in the True Saintless Holy Land, her strength is many times stronger than the ordinary half-step Legendary Realm, about hundreds of millions of eternity ago, the Frostless Lord fought against the enemy's three half-step Legendary Realm Lords alone, severely injured two, killed one, and even escaped with serious injuries before a Legendary Realm Lord, and was able to escape in front of the Legendary Realm Lord, such a half-step Legendary Realm Lord is not many billions"

"Umeng, don't praise me, my strength is still far behind!"

Lord Frostless said modestly.

"Let's go in first!"

Several half-step Legendary Realm Lords and Ye Tian did not continue to discuss, but walked towards the lair of the Purple Aurora Beast

Along the way, there were constantly purple aurora beasts looking for death, and they were all bombarded and killed by several half-step Legendary Realm lords.

Several half-step Legendary Realm Lords didn't dare to be interested in these Purple Aurora Beasts, and the Purple Aurora Beast whose strength had reached the Transcendence Realm had some value, so it was taken away by the Frostless Lord.

Ye Tian, on the other hand, was very interested in these Purple Aurora Beasts, but he was only interested in their time talent.

As a result, Ye Tian kept copying their time talents.

It's a pity that the number of Purple Aurora Beasts here is not very large.

Soon, everyone had already arrived at the lair of the Purple Aurora Beast.

The Purple Aurora Beast's lair is an island, the area is not too large, but there are a lot of resources on it.

The frostless lord stood on the island, probed the fan, and said: "This is not a real lair, it is migrated, these purple aurora beasts should be the losers who failed to fight for territory, they have been driven away 130, they moved this island and came to this area, there is no time here to Hengjin billion"

Several half-step Legendary Realm Lords were not only not disappointed, but also had inexplicable expectations.

"Interrogate it!"

Lord Umon proposed.

Wow!

The half-step Legendary Realm Lord, known as the Lord of Sound Dreams, casually grabbed a weaker Purple Aurora Beast, and his eyes turned gray as he looked at the Purple Aurora Beast.

The next moment, the Purple Aurora Beast stopped moving.

After a while, the Purple Aurora Beast lost its breath of life, and Lord Sound Dream returned to normal.

"I've almost spied a fragment of time, these Purple Aurora Beasts are coming from this direction, let's keep shuttling and looking for them. Lord Otomu said.

"Okay, let's look in this direction."

The Frostless Lord nodded.

Ye Tian also followed, after all, this was his credit, and these half-step Legendary Realm lords would not fail to take him

In this way, they continued to move forward, looking for the true lair location of these Purple Aurora Beasts.

Time passes slowly.

In the blink of an eye, hundreds of thousands of years have passed.

Finally this day.

Ye Tian and the others discovered the traces of the Purple Aurora Beast again. _
